property.value: Shared protocol vocabulary: command envelopes, diagnostics, schema-version constants, and the record/enum families for layout/render/export/source/plugin. The stable kernel; its real product surface is the JSON schemas under schemas/, of which these records are the typed projection.
Typed IR spine — the SceneGraph / LaidOutScene seam types that engine-api speaks (Plan B P4). Sits between contracts and engine-api.
ArchiMate notation core: the type vocabulary and semantic validation for ArchiMate source models. Depends on nothing internal.
UML notation core: the type vocabulary and semantic validation for UML source models.
Small utility core that fetches and caches external standards schemas for export validation.
The typed engine seam: SemanticsEngine / LayoutEngine / RenderEngine / ExportEngine interfaces. Interfaces only; depends on contracts and ir.
Orchestration and backend-neutral policy: command handlers, the build driver, in-memory engine dispatch, schema/source validation, and layout-quality checks. Drives engines only through engine-api.
Profile-routing semantics engine (wire id still generic-graph) plus base scene projection. Dispatches to the per-notation front ends.
ArchiMate notation front end: the per-notation legality checks the router dispatches to. Depends on the archimate core.
UML notation front end: the per-notation legality checks the router dispatches to. Depends on the uml core.
The Eclipse ELK Layered layout engine: computes node geometry and edge routes.
The SVG render engine: owns styling and marker policy. The only engine that touches both notation cores.
ArchiMate Open Exchange Format (OEF) compatibility export engine. Validates in-JVM via schema-cache.
UML/XMI compatibility export engine. Validates in-JVM via schema-cache.
MCP stdio protocol adapter: marshals tool calls into core commands and returns the same envelopes verbatim. Owns no orchestration or engine construction.
The thin entrypoint and composition root: parses arguments, assembles a request, calls core, prints the envelope. EngineWiring is the one class that constructs the engine implementations.
Assembly and distribution: bundles the single cli launcher (hosting the engines in-process), generates third-party notices and the SBOM, and runs the dist smoke. Top of the graph.
